emails.subject: PG&E Baja Capacity
emails.body: PG&E Baja Capacity Mike Grigsby recalled that the capacity on the LDC (PG&E Baja path was also included in this process. Do you know why it fell out of the proposed arrangement?

emails.subject: PG&E Baja Capacity
emails.body: PG&E Baja Capacity Mike Grigsby recalled that the capacity on the LDC (PG&E Baja path was also included in this process. Do you know why it fell out of the proposed arrangement?

emails.subject: RE: PG&E Baja Capacity
emails.body: RE: PG&E Baja Capacity That was a side negotiation between Barry and Bob Barron at PG&E. It has nothing to do with the collateral requirement. Bill

emails.subject: RE: PG&E Baja Capacity
